arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-2 Crystal Palace: Match report and talking points as Gunners come from behind
arts.sum: Arsenal are into the Carabao Cup quarter-finals after a 3-2 win over Crystal Palace at the Emirates Stadium, but it took a much-improved second half performance after initially falling behind. With Martin Odegaard, William Saliba and Saka on the pitch, it laid the foundation for Gabriel Jesus to go on and score a decisive hat-trick.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus posts four-word message after Arsenal hat-trick amid Mikel Arteta striker dilemma
arts.sum: It’s the same with Kieran and other players who haven’t started many games and today they had the chance to do so." I think it’s a great thing for him and the team that we can rely on a player of such quality.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-2 Crystal Palace: Player ratings as Jesus hat-trick seals Carabao Cup progress
arts.sum: Palace took a surprise early lead to pile further misery on a struggling Gunners when Jean-Philippe Mateta capitalised on a Jakub Kiwior mistake and then outmuscled the defender to finish. SUB: Gabriel (87' for Kiwior)

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta urged to sign Marcus Rashford as Gunners eye France star
arts.sum: Arsenal's lack of firepower this season and need for reliable striker who can provide goals has been highlighted countless times, and Mikel Arteta will be hoping the club back him in January to boost their titles hopes

arts.ttl: Arsenal contract latest: Defender set to leave in summer transfer window after Mikel Arteta, club decide against extension
arts.sum: Reports suggest that Arsenal will not offer a new contract to defender and are set to lose him for free in summer transfer window when his deal expires.

Hat-trick hero Gabriel Jesus was the star of the show, with the help of the instant impact of substitutes Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka, as we came from behind to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 and reach the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup on Wednesday night. It took just four minutes for the visitors to open the scoring when Mateta got on the end of a long ball over the top from Dean Henderson and muscled off Jakub Kiwior before picking out the bottom right corner on his left foot.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star to 'LEAVE the club after six years' following chiefs' decision not to renew his contract
arts.sum: This season has been plagued by a hamstring injury picked up during the Euro 2024 campaign. He returned to the bench last month and even started Wednesday's EFL Cup win over Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Celtic keen on Tierney reunion after injury-hit Scotland full-back is told his Arsenal contract won't be extended
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers wants to secure a stunning return to Celtic for Kieran Tierney.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans love what they spotted Kieran Tierney doing in win over Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Arsenal have reached the Carabao Cup semi-finals after running out 3-2 winners over Crystal Palace on Wednesday night. Jean-Philippe Mateta opened the scoring for Crystal...
